title: AMLO Presidency Update — Apr 19, 2026
summary: New timeline era added covering post-presidency 4T legacy: Tren Maya full network completion (Dec 2024), Mexico's historic first judicial elections with Morena sweeping the Supreme Court at 13% turnout (Jun 2025), AMLO's 'Grandeza' book release from retirement in Palenque (Nov 2025), and the Dos Bocas Olmeca refinery's four safety incidents in three weeks including a deadly March 2026 fire that killed five people. New political figure Héctor Aguilar Ortiz (Morena-linked Chief Justice elected by popular vote) added. New contested claim on the 2025 judicial elections outcome. Econ fiscal-balance sparkData corrected to reflect the 5.7% GDP deficit that was the actual 2024 year-end figure.
